step_rationale: Triglyceride and phospholipid hydrolysis; lipoprotein remodeling and composition.
mechanism: Hepatic lipase remodels lipoprotein composition through triglyceride and phospholipid hydrolysis, influencing atherogenic lipoprotein heterogeneity.

references.title: Hepatic Lipase: a Comprehensive View of its Role on Plasma Lipid and Lipoprotein Metabolism.
Lipases as modulators of atherosclerosis in murine models.
